description: A carrier's insurance certificate is about to expire. A compliance specialist must obtain and upload the new certificate.

nodes.task_description: Receive a system alert that a carrier's insurance expires in 30 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is notified of the pending expiration.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated request to the carrier for their updated insurance certificate.

expected_outcome.expected: An email is sent to the carrier's compliance contact.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new certificate from the carrier and upload it to their profile in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully uploads the new document.

nodes.task_description: Update the expiration date in the carrier's profile, which removes the compliance alert.

expected_outcome.expected: The carrier's profile is updated, and they remain in good standing.
